name: components/toggle-button
description: A button that can be pressed to toggle an on/off state, commonly used in toolbars and formatting controls. Provides default and outline variants with sm/default/lg sizes, and exposes the underlying toggleButtonVariants cva definition for reuse. Built on Kobalte ToggleButton with data-[pressed] state styling and full keyboard operability.
useCases: Rich-text editor toolbars for Bold, Italic, Underline, and Strikethrough toggles
View-mode switches such as Grid vs List in file managers or galleries
Annotation tools in drawing apps (brush, eraser, selection) that stay active while pressed
Favorite or bookmark buttons that visually reflect an active/inactive state
